snippet.title: Dolly Parton, Kenny Rogers - Islands In the Stream (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⭐ Dolly Parton, Kenny Rogers - Islands In the Stream (Lyrics)

Levelonee Playlist Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4XHGONRqxXql8oMaJ8WGgQ?si=573804b14da244e2

Listen " Islands In the Stream " on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/track/6dnco8haegnJYtylV26cBq?si=e6e17044b9334317

Follow Dolly Parton
@DollyParton

#country #softrock #dollyparton #kennyrogers #islandsinthestreams #lyrics

(Lyrics)

[Verse 1: Kenny Rogers]
Baby, when I met you there was peace unknown
I set out to get you, with a fine toothcomb
I was soft inside
There was something going on

[Verse 2: Kenny Rogers & Dolly Parton]
You do something to me that I can't explain
Hold me closer and I feel no pain
Every beat of my heart
We got something going on
[Pre-Chorus 1: Kenny Rogers, Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
Tender love is blind
It requires a dedication
All this love we feel needs no conversation
We ride it together, huhn huh
Making love with each other, huhn hah

[Chorus: Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
Islands in the stream
That is what we are
No one in between
How can we be wrong
Sail away with me
To another world
And we rely on each other, huhn hah
From one lover to another, huhn hah

[Verse 3: Dolly Parton]
I can't live without you if the love was gone
Everything is nothing if you got no one
And you just walk in the night
Slowly losing sight of the real thing

[Verse 4: Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
But that won't happen to us and we got no doubt
Too deep in love and we got no way out
And the message is clear
This could be the year for the real thing
You might also like
Peppers
Lana Del Rey
Like Crazy (English Version)
Jimin (지민)
Nobody Gets Me
SZA
[Pre-Chorus 2: Dolly Parton, Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
No more will you cry
Baby, I will hurt you never
We start and end as one
In love forever
We can ride it together, huhn hah
Making love with each other, huhn hah

[Chorus: Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
Islands in the stream
That is what we are
No one in between
How can we be wrong
Sail away with me
To another world
And we rely on each other, huhn hah
From one lover to another, huhn hah

[Interlude: Kenny Rodgers, Dolly Parton]
Sail away
Oh, come sail away with me

[Chorus: Kenny Rodgers & Dolly Parton]
Islands in the stream
That is what we are
No one in between
How can we be wrong
Sail away with me
To another world
And we rely on each other, huhn hah
From one lover to another, huhn hah
Islands in the stream
That is what we are
No one in between
How can we be wrong
Sail away with me
To another world
And we rely on each other, huhn hah
From one lover to another, huhn hah
Islands in the stream
That is what we are
No one in between

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

He turned to me as if to say
"Hurry, boy, it's waiting there for you"

[Chorus: Bobby Kimball]
It's gonna take a lot to drag me away from you
There's nothing that a hundred men or more could ever do
I bless the rains down in Africa
Gonna take some time to do the things we never had (Ooh)

The wild dogs cry out in the night
As they grow restless longing for some solitary company

I seek to cure what's deep inside
Frightened of this thing that I've become

I bless the rains down in Africa

Gonna take some time to do the things we never had

snippet.title: 《黑色眼影》晴天林｜化反白眼妝嚇親網民（原曲：目黑 - 周國賢）
snippet.description:
#晴天林 #反白眼 #眼妝

《黑色眼影》
(原曲：目黑 - 周國賢）

命運就地改寫 只因我化妝的那雙眼
化隻眼劃幾筆求其 眉頭眼額太簡單 
開早會認真的演講 化個妝喜愛偏淡
嚇怕了個樣想還魂
為何這夜變得越來越猛

黑色眼影 全程專心不到雙眼吸晴
講咗乜 誰也沒人在聽
像白蛇精 難頂 如撞鬼就喊驚
靈異過 下一次別鬼整 

當天緊急金鐘開會前來搵間化妝店
眼太細要加深眼線 拜托眼部化一點
打開電視機的寶寶嚇怕睇到喪屍片
公關攝記啞口無言
人人似是見鬼 為何在笑

黑色眼影 全程專心不到雙眼吸晴
講咗乜 誰也沒人在聽
像白蛇精 難頂 如撞鬼就喊驚
靈異過 下一次別鬼整

黑色眼影 還魂姨姨開會雙眼吸晴
（驚嚇的眼睛 Halloween最興）
講咗乜 誰也沒人在聽
（得罪了化妝師太即興）
咒怨情景 無影 留低會內喊驚
（遺憾美 形象變身反白眼猩猩）
靈異過 厲鬼再別邀請

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

snippet.title: Charlie Puth - Home (feat. Hikaru Utada)
snippet.description:
Listen to "Home" now: http://charlieputh.lnk.to/Home
Pre-order 'Whatever's Clever!': http://charlieputh.lnk.to/whateversclever

Credits:
Director: @huntermoreno
Creative Director: @crystallinestructures
EP: @Missymg @Isaacrice76
Producer: @Missymg
Prod Manager: @itsabiperl
Head of Digital: @jeffolson12
Production Co: @houndcontent

Label: @atlanticrecords
VP Creative: @lilamander
VP of Digital: @Justinhorowitz
Sr. Director, Creative: @itsamberra 
Marketing Director: @lill.wa 

MGMT: @mikaelaputh 
MGMT: @stiklori
MGMT: Bo Young Lee

DP: @loganmeis
1st AC: Chris Siefert
Gaffer: @jordanbrodiefilms

Charlie Glam: @sydneysollod
Charlie Stylist: @seanknight 

Editor: @rees.editor
Color: @ariannashiningstar 
Beauty: @maxcoltt 
PA: @kalee_belle

London Team:
Executive Producer: @missymg @marisagarnerassociates
Producer: @_fyoooo

DP:  @nickbourdeaux_dp
1st AC: @jaywhittington
Gaffer: @adamtrz.gaffer 
Spark: George Greenwood

Label: Sony Music / Epic Records Japan
A&R: Mina Okachi
Hikaru Team: Kayoko Otomo
Hikaru Team: Michael Martin 
Hikaru Glam: @kominehi 

Seamstress: Amy Fulcher
Styling Asst: Abi Wood
PA’s: Ditte Ravn, Max Eatherdon, Lewis Adams

Lyrics:

V1
Through the rose colored lenses
And the white picket fences
No matter how good this is
It could never satisfy
When it’s you that I’m missing
Now I sit in the kitchen
Through the window pane I
Watch the day, turn to night
P1
It ain’t a mystery
That every time you leave
That’s when I feel the most alone oh
C1
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go,
It feels so cold without the soul,
You’re the one who makes this house a home.
V2
一人の時間も大事 (Time alone is also precious)
誰にも妥協せず (Not compromising to anyone)
私だけのお城を築いた (I built my very own castle)
But it’s you I was missing
君に毎日ただいまと言わせてください (Please let me say “I’m home” to you every day)
P2
行ってらしゃい (Have a good day An everyday phrase in Japanese you say to your family when they leave the house)
君がいないこの家わ好きじゃない (I don’t like this house without you in it)
C2
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go
夏でも凍えちゃいそう (I fear I may freeze even in summer)
君の温もりがhome (Your warmth is home)
BRIDGE
It ain’t a mystery
That every time you leave
That’s when I feel the most alone
当たり前になりそうな時 (when it’s about to be taken for granted)
思い出してほしい (I hope you’ll remember)
C3
Ooo, don’t you know?
That you’re the one who makes this house a home
And so, when you go,
It feels so cold without the soul,
You’re the one who makes this house a home.
ある日楽園で目が覚めても (even if i wake up in paradise one day)
君がいなきゃ長居しないね (wihtout you there I wouldn’t stay long)
どんなごうてい手に入れったて (Even if i owned a dream mansion)
君がいなきゃハリボテ同然 (wihtout you there it would be a mere facade)
(Hikaru) You’re the one
(Charlie)
(Unison) You’re the one

Kelley starring Oscar, Emmy and Golden Globe Award nominee Elle Fanning, Golden Globe winner and Oscar and Emmy Award nominee Michelle Pfeiffer, Oscar and Emmy winner Nicole Kidman, and Emmy Award winner Nick Offerman, based on the bestselling novel by Rufi Thorpe.

“Margo’s Got Money Troubles” is a bold, heartwarming and comedic family drama following recent college dropout and aspiring writer, Margo (Fanning), the daughter of an ex-Hooter’s waitress (Pfeiffer) and ex-pro wrestler (Offerman), as she’s forced to make her way with a new baby, a mounting pile of bills and a dwindling amount of ways to pay them. The series also stars Academy Award winner Marcia Gay Harden, Academy Award nominee and Emmy Award winner Greg Kinnear, Michael Angarano, Rico Nasty and Lindsey Normington.

“Margo’s Got Money Troubles” is produced for Apple TV by A24. Kelley Productions. Pfeiffer, Thorpe, Eva Anderson and Boo Killebrew also executive produce. BAFTA and Emmy Award winner Dearbhla Walsh directs the pilot and serves as an executive producer. snippet.title: "Grief and Destruction" - Marsh Family parody of Barry McGuire's "Eve of Destruction" on war in Iran
snippet.description:
There are obviously lots of angles to this story, and it’s dangerous to wade into things without knowing how they will play out. So we waited to see if anything positive might emerge after the initial assassination of the despicable Khamenei (whose name was in an early draft of a chorus), and what the Trump administration/regime’s purported rationale was … and over subsequent days as we watched the grotesque media performances by Hegseth, the missiles killing children not just tyrants, and the escalation of damage and casualties without any sign of a coherent policy or endgame, we made the song about how it’s dangerous to wade into things without knowing how they’re going to play out. 

If we’d known undead Tony Blair was going to remerge from the media crypt with some pearls of wisdom on Sunday, we would have probably made space to take the piss out of that ... but it would have been counterproductive to just parachute in (a bit like in 2003).

The original track “Eve of Destruction” was only reluctantly laid down at the end of a recording session by a gravelly-voiced Barry McGuire, and the demo leaked to a radio station where it was an instant hit in a country torn apart and increasingly divided over foreign wars and domestic protests in late 1965. Phil Sloan wrote the song months earlier, after the Gulf of Tonkin incident that was central to LBJ’s justification for US escalation in Vietnam. We had it on our radar for a future conflict, but want to give a shoutout to Kevin Ellis for urging us to use it to address this conflict.

If you want to hear a properly mixed folk-pop song of ours about the heroic protest movement in Iran, then you can find “Zan Zendegi Azadi” on our forthcoming album.


___________________________

Pre-order CDs or LPs of the album: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

- https://bsky.app/profile/marshfamilysongs.bsky.social 
- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa

___________________________

LYRICS:

The Middle Eastern world, it is explodin’
Violence flarin’, Hegseth’s gloatin’
He made a macho reel – weird self-promotin’
He’s revelling in war: he’s laughin’ and he’s jokin’
And even though it’s clear all the carnage it’s provokin’

You can tell Pete’s
Over promoted and kind of a sad bellend
How d’ya show such glee
Spreading grief and destruction?

No-one understands what Trump’s trying to say
Can’t explain his aims – they’re shifting each day!
A pre-emptive half putsch? Regime change or play?
Wishing power to the people, as he bombs them away
Watch the ‘peacemaker’ deploy: he’s Netanyahu’s boy!

“Epic Fury”
Over and over and over again, my friend
That’s what Trump may reap
For his war of distraction 

Yeah, they wanted it so bad, the headlines to be makin’
The death toll’s sad – but not worth contemplatin’
Torpedoes look cool – the memes that they’re creatin’
Make Hegseth drool! You bet he’s masturbatin’
His WhatsApp’s hot – can’t hide his excitation
While US respect is DIS-integratin’
And the whole fuckin’ Gulf kinda escalatin’

It’s not healthy
Over and over and over again, my friend
To be so naïve
Spreading grief and destruction

Some think it’s so the Strait can be used to bully China
Or softening the ground for control of oil refiners
You may racketeer … and leaders replace
But as bodies pile up, you’ll be losing your base
The poundin' of the drums, the pride and disgrace
As you bury some schoolkids, or refugees displace
And the White House tailors a photo-op to fake grace

Same old story! Over and over and over and over again,  my friend:
The legacy the bombing leaves is destruction
Oh-oh, the legacy the bombing leaves is destruction

snippet.title: Why Dhurandhar: The Revenge Could Be India’s BIGGEST EVER Movie
snippet.description:
In this video, we talk about the details seen in the Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer. The trailer does not reveal much of the story, but some scenes give hints about the plot and how the story might move forward. We discuss how the film appears to focus on Pakistan’s proxy war tactics and how the narrative may develop around that theme. The trailer also seems to show parts of Ranveer Singh’s character’s early life before his mission connected to Pakistan. We also cover the strong reactions and discussions that started after the trailer was released, showing how much hype the movie has created. Reports suggest that another film, Toxic, postponed its release around the same time. We also discuss how newer directors like Aditya Dhar are bringing a different style and approach to Bollywood storytelling.

snippet.title: Scary Movie 6 Trailer FLAGGED & Restricted – Pronoun Joke Backlash Explodes!
snippet.description:
The Scary Movie 6 trailer just dropped and it's already causing massive chaos online—kicking off with a savage pronoun joke where a stabbed victim corrects the crowd mid-attack: "My pronouns are they/them—he stabbed them!" Classic Scary Movie equal-opportunity roasting is back, but the backlash is real, with some calling it dated, groan-inducing, or worse, while others defend it as harmless comedy from the Wayans brothers. Now, the trailer itself has reportedly been flagged and age-restricted on YouTube for mature content, limiting views and sparking even more outrage over "butt hurt" reactions, cancel culture whining, and endless pronoun discourse in 2026. Dive into the full breakdown of the controversy, why the joke is dividing fans, the ongoing meltdown from woke crowds demanding edits or removal, and how this might signal the return of unfiltered parody horror-comedy.
